expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Patient confirms readiness with a brief 'yes'
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
check_connect returns success
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
pair_device returns success
Agent asks patient to confirm device is paired and connected
Patient reports waiting for pairing approval
Agent guides patient to pair device manually via Bluetooth settings
Patient confirms device paired successfully
Agent explains ECG recording step and provides instructions to remain still
Agent calls recording_request
recording_request returns success
Agent asks patient to remain still during 60-second recording
Patient confirms ECG recording completed
Agent explains database check and calls check_record_ECG_correctly
check_record_ECG_correctly returns success with validation
Agent explains finish step and calls finish_recording
finish_recording returns success
Agent provides completion message with confirmation

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant AI. I'm here to help you record an ECG using a Bluetooth ECG sensor. I'll guide you through each step of the process.

First, are you ready to begin? Please let me know when you're ready to start.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let's begin the ECG recording process.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

I'm now going to check if your Bluetooth is enabled on your device.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your Bluetooth is enabled and working properly.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

Now I will check if your ECG device is paired with your device. I'll send a pairing request.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Excellent! The pairing request was sent successfully. Please make sure your ECG device is turned on and in pairing mode. Once you see the device appear on your Bluetooth list, please pair it manually. 

Could you please confirm when your ECG device is successfully paired and connected to your device?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Waiting for user to approve pairing

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I understand you're waiting for the pairing to be approved. Please go to your device's Bluetooth settings, find the ECG device in the list of available devices, and tap on it to pair and connect.

Once you've successfully paired and connected the ECG device to your device, please let me know by saying something like "Paired and connected" or "Yes, it's connected now."

I'll wait for your confirmation before proceeding to the next step.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Thank you for confirming that your ECG device is now paired successfully.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

Everything is ready. I will now start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain as still as possible during the recording to ensure we get clear readings.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! The recording request has been sent successfully. The ECG recording should now be in progress. Please continue to remain still for the full 60 seconds while the device records your ECG.

Once the recording is complete, I'll proceed to the next step to check if the data was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Excellent! Thank you for staying still during the recording.

**Step 4 — Check Database Integrity**

I will now check if your ECG was saved correctly in our system and ensure all the data is valid and properly formatted.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG record has been saved successfully. The system has verified that all the data is complete, valid, and properly stored.

**Step 5 — Finish**

Now I'll complete the recording process and notify you that all your ECG data has been collected successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Wonderful! I have successfully notified you that all your ECG data has been collected.

**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording process is now complete. All your clinical data has been saved successfully in our system. The 60-second ECG recording has been verified and stored properly.

Thank you for following the instructions carefully. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to ask.

messages.content: Great! Let's begin the ECG recording process...
Excellent! The pairing request was sent successfully...
Waiting for user to approve pairing
I understand you're waiting for the pairing to be approved...
Great! The recording request has been sent successfully...
Excellent! Thank you for staying still...
Perfect! Your ECG record has been saved successfully...
Wonderful! I have successfully notified you...
